title: Power
Description
Category
Key Aspect
table-781-781.caption: List the powers of Hunter Zolomon.
data: Manipulates his personal timeline to move at apparent superhuman speeds.
Not true super-speed, but time alteration
Delivers blows with immense force by accelerating his personal timeline relative to impact.
Withstands extreme impacts and forces due to temporal field surrounding him.
Temporal field absorbs or deflects damage
Exhibits extreme reflexes and coordination by perceiving time differently.
Enhanced reaction time through temporal perception
Can vibrate his molecules at a frequency that allows him to pass through solid objects.
Can potentially shift through short periods of time or create temporal ripples.
Often an uncontrolled or secondary effect
Can project concussive force or energy by manipulating temporal fields.
